Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Trevor Ewald, (tewald@live.com), Plaintiff.
Laurie Yoon, Esq. (415.524.4303; lyoon@murchisonlaw.com) of Murchison & Cumming LLP for Defendant (audio only).

Discussed. Mr. Ewald stated that his attorney is still in the hospital. Ms. Yoon stated parties had a case management conference in Dept 624 and reached a settlement. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS DONALD HARDY and TATTOO CITY, LLC'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is ordered off calendar. Parties may re-file their motion in the assigned trial dept.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Continued To Nov-29-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Trevor Ewald (tewald@live.com), Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Discussed. Mr. Ewald reported that his attorney had a heart attack last week and requested a continuance.

The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS DONALD HARDY and TATTOO CITY, LLC'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is continued to November 29, 2022 at 9:30am, Law and Motion Department.

Mr. Ewald notified counsel of continuance date via email with CC to court after hearing on 11/22/2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
